title: ouratea lucens var. podogyna
intro: Ouratea lucens var. podogyna, also known as the "Yellow Ouratea" or "Yellow Water Plum", is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, derived from its bark, leaves, and roots. The health benefits of Ouratea lucens var. podogyna include treatment of fever, wounds, and skin infections, and it is also used to prepare herbal teas and infusions for its purported medicinal and health-promoting effects.
